title: Mattel Minecraft Story Set with 4 Action Figures & 3 Accessories, Overworld Encounters Pack Inspired by A Minecraft Movie, Toy Collectible, JFR70
features: From A Minecraft Movie, this Overworld Encounters Pack is an instant collection with 4 action figures and 3 weapon accessories.
This close encounter of the overworld kind features Natalie and 3 spooky creatures as action figures, including a Spider, Skeleton and Creeper.
Natalie has a diamond sword and Skeleton comes with a bow and arrow -- just like in the movie.
Designed in 4-inch scale, Natalie action figure wears a soft skirt for a tactile touch.
Add to a collection or gift to a fan and bring the Minecraft fun to life for Minecraft lovers and collectors of all ages.
description: Product Description Step through the portal and into the adventurous world of A Minecraft Movie with this epic story set crafted with four action figures and three accessories! The Overworld Encounters pack includes a Natalie action figure with a skirt made of cloth, and a host of attacking mobs -- a spooky spider, a menacing skeleton and a creepy…creeper. Armed with the diamond sword, will Natalie make it out? The collectible set makes a fun video game-themed gift for Minecraft lovers ages 6 years old and up. Colors and decorations may vary. Safety Warning No point-of-sale warning applicable
